temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A woman in a blue bathrobe stands in a bathroom, looking out a small, frosted window. Her face is filled with shock and horror as she gasps, realizing something is wrong. She reaches out and frantically tries to open the window, which is stuck. (Storyline: The scene opens with immediate tension as the woman discovers a problem, likely a power outage, trapping her inside the bathroom with no way out.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to build.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to an exterior view, showing the woman trapped inside a small, dark, snow-filled crawlspace under a wooden structure. She is lying on her back, her body contorted as she struggles to push herself up and escape the confined, icy space. (Storyline: This cut reveals the source of the woman's panic: she is physically trapped in a snow-filled crawlspace, unable to get out.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous, suspenseful music continues, now with a more prominent, rhythmic beat.)
